guardrails.title: No Raw SQL Without Sanitization
guardrails.body: When using `query()` or `$db->rawQuery()`, placeholders shall be used. Building SQL via string concatenation is prohibited.

guardrails.title: Fat Model, Skinny Controller
guardrails.body: Business logic shall reside in Models. Controllers shall not contain business logic.

guardrails.title: Validate Before Save
guardrails.body: Models shall define validation rules via `beforeSave` or `$validate`. Calling `save()` without validation is prohibited.

guardrails.title: No Direct Session Manipulation
guardrails.body: Direct access to `$_SESSION` is prohibited. Use `CakeSession` instead.
